author: mmusich
body:
#### PR description:

Somewhat inspired by https://github.com/cms-sw/cmssw/pull/50306 I profit of the same suggestions to speed-up `SiPixelBadFEDChannelSimulationSanityChecker`.
I profit of this to add `SimpleMemoryCheck` and `Timing` service in the configuration.
Finally a new unit test `SiPixelBadFEDChannelSimulationSanityChecker` is added to the existing battery of tests of this package.

#### PR validation:

After instrumenting the configuration with the `Timing` service the execution with the payloads proposed at https://github.com/cms-sw/cmssw/pull/50274 goes from:

```bash
TimeReport> Time report complete in 143.089 seconds
 Time Summary: 
 - Min event:   130.6
 - Max event:   130.6
 - Avg event:   130.6
 - Total loop:  135.688
 - Total init:  7.40042
 - Total job:   143.089
 - Total EventSetup: 5.08463
 - Total non-module: 0.00108932
 Event Throughput: 0.00736982 ev/s
 CPU Summary: 
 - Total loop:     130.311
 - Total init:     2.37016
 - Total extra:    0
 - Total children: 0.094971
 - Total job:      132.681
 Processing Summary: 
 - Number of Events:  1
 - Number of Global Begin Lumi Calls:  1
 - Number of Global Begin Run Calls: 1
```

to:

```bash
TimeReport> Time report complete in 9.82585 seconds
 Time Summary: 
 - Min event:   0.175666
 - Max event:   0.175666
 - Avg event:   0.175666
 - Total loop:  5.20172
 - Total init:  4.62412
 - Total job:   9.82585
 - Total EventSetup: 5.01505
 - Total non-module: 0.00104775
 Event Throughput: 0.192244 ev/s
 CPU Summary: 
 - Total loop:     3.3742
 - Total init:     2.20652
 - Total extra:    0
 - Total children: 0.09185
 - Total job:      5.58073
 Processing Summary: 
 - Number of Events:  1
 - Number of Global Begin Lumi Calls:  1
 - Number of Global Begin Run Calls: 1
```
#### If this PR is a backport please specify the original PR and why you need to backport that PR. If this PR will be backported please specify to which release cycle the backport is meant for:

Not a backport, might be backported.
title: Speed-up `SiPixelBadFEDChannelSimulationSanityChecker`
